title: Stream Scholar Contract Error Codes
description: Machine-readable error code mapping for frontend integration. Each error code maps to actionable student guidance.

0x1000.name: Unauthorized
0x1000.studentAction: Please ensure you are logged in with the correct account permissions

0x1001.name: Platform Admin Required
0x1001.studentAction: Contact your university administrator or platform support

0x1002.name: University Admin Required
0x1002.studentAction: Contact your university registrar or financial aid office

0x1003.name: Security Council Required
0x1003.studentAction: This action is restricted to security council members only

0x1004.name: Committee Membership Required
0x1004.studentAction: Only committee members can perform this action

0x1005.name: SEP-12 Verification Required
0x1005.description: SEP-12 identity verification is required for this action
0x1005.studentAction: Complete your identity verification through the portal

0x1100.name: Scholarship Paused
0x1100.studentAction: Check your email for suspension details or contact support

0x1101.name: Scholarship Under Dispute
0x1101.description: Your scholarship is currently under dispute review
0x1101.studentAction: Await resolution notification or contact dispute resolution team

0x1102.name: Scholarship Not Found
0x1102.description: No active scholarship found for your account
0x1102.studentAction: Apply for a scholarship or check if you have been awarded one

0x1103.name: Final Release Already Claimed
0x1103.description: You have already claimed your final scholarship release
0x1103.studentAction: No further action needed - funds have been transferred

0x1104.name: Final Release Not Locked
0x1104.description: Final release voting cannot be initiated yet
0x1104.studentAction: Continue using your scholarship until final release conditions are met

0x1105.name: Final Release Locked
0x1105.description: Final 10% is locked pending community vote
0x1105.studentAction: Participate in community voting to release final funds

0x1200.name: Insufficient Balance
0x1200.description: Not enough funds in your scholarship account
0x1200.studentAction: Wait for next funding cycle or contact your sponsor

0x1201.name: Amount Exceeds Available Balance
0x1201.description: Withdrawal amount exceeds available unlocked balance
0x1201.studentAction: Request a smaller amount within your available balance

0x1202.name: Amount Exceeds Unlocked Balance
0x1202.description: Requested amount exceeds unlocked scholarship balance
0x1202.studentAction: Check your unlocked balance and request a smaller amount

0x1203.name: Invalid Amount
0x1203.studentAction: Enter a positive amount within valid range

0x1204.name: Protocol Fee Overflow
0x1204.studentAction: Try a smaller withdrawal amount or contact support

0x1205.name: Tax Rate Too High
0x1205.description: Tax rate exceeds maximum allowed percentage
0x1205.studentAction: Contact administrator to set appropriate tax rate

0x1206.name: No Balance to Distribute
0x1206.studentAction: Wait for funds to be added to the distribution pool

0x1207.name: XLM Reserve Violation
0x1207.description: Final balance is less than required XLM gas reserve
0x1207.studentAction: Add more funds to meet minimum reserve requirements

0x1300.name: University Security Hold Active
0x1300.description: Your university has placed a security hold on your scholarship
0x1300.studentAction: Contact your university financial aid office for details

0x1301.name: Security Hold Already Inactive
0x1301.description: The security hold is already inactive
0x1301.studentAction: No action needed - hold is already lifted

0x1302.name: Security Hold Not Found
0x1302.studentAction: Contact your university if you believe this is incorrect

0x1400.name: Vote Already Initiated
0x1400.description: Community vote has already been initiated for this scholarship
0x1400.studentAction: Participate in the existing vote or wait for results

0x1401.name: Vote Already Passed
0x1401.description: The community vote has already passed
0x1401.studentAction: You can now claim your final release

0x1402.name: Already Voted
0x1402.description: You have already voted in this election
0x1402.studentAction: Your vote has been recorded - no further action needed

0x1403.name: Vote Not Passed
0x1403.description: Community vote has not passed yet
0x1403.studentAction: Wait for more votes or campaign for support

0x1404.name: Vote Not Found
0x1404.description: No active vote found for this scholarship
0x1404.studentAction: Initiate a new vote or check back later

0x1500.name: Milestone Not Ready
0x1500.description: Academic milestone requirements not yet met
0x1500.studentAction: Submit your transcript to the university portal first

0x1501.name: Milestone Already Claimed
0x1501.description: This milestone has already been claimed
0x1501.studentAction: Move to the next milestone or check your progress

0x1502.name: GPA Below Threshold
0x1502.description: Your GPA is below the required threshold
0x1502.studentAction: Focus on improving your grades or contact academic advisor

0x1503.name: GPA Not Submitted
0x1503.description: Your GPA has not been submitted to the system
0x1503.studentAction: Submit your official transcript to the registrar office

0x1504.name: Transcript Not Verified
0x1504.description: Your transcript has not been verified by the oracle
0x1504.studentAction: Ensure your transcript is officially submitted and processed

0x1600.name: Invalid Configuration
0x1600.studentAction: Check your input parameters and try again

0x1601.name: Clawback Percentage Too High
0x1601.studentAction: Set a lower clawback percentage within allowed limits

0x1602.name: Committee Full
0x1602.description: The committee has reached maximum capacity
0x1602.studentAction: Contact administrator to expand committee or wait for openings

0x1603.name: Invalid Slot
0x1603.description: The committee slot number is invalid
0x1603.studentAction: Choose a valid committee slot number

0x1604.name: Invalid Milestone Count
0x1604.studentAction: Set a valid milestone count between 1 and 64

0x1605.name: Invalid Mask Length
0x1605.description: Parent mask length does not match milestone count
0x1605.studentAction: Ensure mask length matches the number of milestones

0x1606.name: Milestone Dependency Cycle
0x1606.description: Milestone dependencies create a circular reference
0x1606.studentAction: Remove circular dependencies in milestone configuration

0x1700.name: Export Blocked - Pending Discipline
0x1700.description: Reputation export blocked due to pending disciplinary action
0x1700.studentAction: Resolve disciplinary issues before exporting reputation

0x1701.name: Replay Attack Detected
0x1701.studentAction: Use a new nonce for each export request

0x1702.name: Cross-Chain Collision
0x1702.studentAction: Wait a moment and try again with a new request

0x1800.name: No Active Committee Session
0x1800.description: No active committee review session found
0x1800.studentAction: Start a new committee review session

0x1801.name: Committee Still in Review Window
0x1801.description: Committee review window has not expired
0x1801.studentAction: Wait for the review window to expire before finalizing

0x1802.name: Already Finalized
0x1802.description: This committee review has already been finalized
0x1802.studentAction: No further action needed - review is complete

0x1803.name: Committee Session Not Found
0x1803.description: The specified committee session does not exist
0x1803.studentAction: Verify the session ID or create a new session

0x1900.name: Oracle Data Stale
0x1900.description: Oracle data is too old and considered stale
0x1900.studentAction: Wait for fresh oracle data or contact data provider

0x1901.name: Invalid Oracle Signature
0x1901.studentAction: Contact oracle provider or try with fresh data

0x1902.name: Timelock Not Expired
0x1902.description: Required timelock period has not expired
0x1902.studentAction: Wait for the timelock period to complete

0x1903.name: Replay Attack Detected
0x1903.studentAction: Use a fresh transaction with new parameters

0x1A00.name: Leaderboard Empty
0x1A00.description: No students found on the leaderboard
0x1A00.studentAction: Participate in activities to appear on the leaderboard

0x1A01.name: Research Bonus Not Initialized
0x1A01.description: Research bonus fund has not been initialized
0x1A01.studentAction: Contact administrator to initialize the bonus fund

0x1A03.name: Execution Delay Not Met
0x1A03.description: Required execution delay period has not passed
0x1A03.studentAction: Wait for the delay period to expire before executing
